tools.name: -health-check
tools.description: Internal health check tool. Verifies Personal Access Token and connectivity to Figma.

tools.name: get-file
tools.description: Get the full structure of a Figma file including pages, frames, and components.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-file-styles
tools.description: Get all styles (colors, text, effects) defined in a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-file-variables
tools.description: Get all variables (design tokens) from a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-node
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific node by its ID.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-components
tools.description: List all components in a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-component-sets
tools.description: List all component sets (variants) in a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: export-images
tools.description: Export nodes as images (PNG, JPG, SVG, or PDF).

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-comments
tools.description: Get all comments on a Figma file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: get-team-projects
tools.description: List all projects in a team. If teamId is not provided, uses the configured TEAM_ID from user secrets.

teamId.description: The team ID (optional if TEAM_ID is configured in user secrets)

tools.name: get-project-files
tools.description: List all files in a project.

tools.name: extract-colors
tools.description: Extract all colors used in a file or node, formatted for CSS/Tailwind.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL

tools.name: extract-typography
tools.description: Extract all typography styles from a file.

fileKey.description: The file key from Figma URL
